workflow_steps.name: Data Source Assessment
workflow_steps.description: Evaluate ArXiv API endpoints and ACL Anthology API compatibility

workflow_steps.name: Metadata Schema Mapping
workflow_steps.description: Transform ArXiv metadata fields to ACL Anthology schema

transformations.arxiv_categories_to_acl_venues: Map cs.CL, cs.LG to ACL venues like ACL, EMNLP, NAACL
transformations.date_format_conversion: Convert ArXiv ISO dates to ACL year format
transformations.author_format_normalization: Standardize author name formats between systems

workflow_steps.name: Paper Content Processing
workflow_steps.description: Adapt ArXiv PDF processing pipeline for ACL requirements
workflow_steps.arxiv_processing: Standard PDF extraction and text processing
workflow_steps.acl_requirements: ACL-specific formatting, citation extraction, venue classification

workflow_steps.name: Quality Assurance Pipeline
workflow_steps.arxiv_qa: Basic metadata validation and PDF integrity checks
workflow_steps.acl_qa: Enhanced validation including venue compatibility, author affiliation verification

workflow_steps.name: Ingestion and Indexing
workflow_steps.description: Transfer processed papers to ACL Anthology infrastructure
workflow_steps.arxiv_storage: ArXiv internal storage and indexing system
workflow_steps.acl_storage: ACL Anthology GitHub-based storage with XML metadata

validation_rules: All JSON outputs must validate against schema
File paths must be absolute and exist
Timestamps must be in ISO 8601 format
IDs must follow ACL anthology format (e.g., 2024.acl-long.123)

evidence_priority.conflict_resolution: Prioritize recent, executable evidence over outdated references

notes: Procedure transfer from ArXiv to ACL pipeline completed with deterministic artifacts and strict schema adherence
